name: Valmiera Open 2022

venue.name: [Vidzemes augstskola inženierzinātņu fakultāte, T106](https://va.lv/lv)
venue.details: Go to the main entrance and follow the signs. Main entrance is from the garden side

information:
Pirmās ātrkubošanas sacensības Valmierā. Nāc un sacenties ar citiem, un labi pavadīts laiks garantēts!

---

First speedcubing competition to be held in the city of Valmiera. Come and compete with others and have a great time!
